name: Stray Kids
overview: Will all of these nine charming boys be able to make it? Find out if the JYP’s most independent trainees can prove themselves to be K-pop idol material and successfully debut as a K-pop idol boy group!

trailers.title: Stray Kids [TEASER] JYP의 새로운 프로젝트가 시작된다! ′Stray Kids′ 171017 EP.1
